hero.headline: Democracy na everyday tin, no be only election day.
hero.sub: CivicOS dey keep public record of wetin citizens dey do for between elections — issues wey people don report, petitions wey dem sign, replies wey rep don give — for your street, inside your community, today.
hero.trust: Open source · Verified accounts · Audit trail for UTC

docket.title: Today docket
docket.live: Live · We update am for {{time}} WAT
docket.paused: E pause · Comot mouse make e continue

parties.title: We build am for everybody for public life

citizens.title: Make your voice count, everyday
citizens.body: Report issue for your street, sign petition for wetin matter to you, follow your reps, and see wetin dem do — for days, no be for election season.

reps.title: Show your work for public
reps.body: Reply your constituents for one place. Your reply rate go dey for your public profile — accountability na part of the design, no be feature wey we add.

government.title: Trusted channel to the public
government.body: Send citizen reports to the right office, publish your work, and show progress with record wey get timestamp wey people fit verify.

ngos.title: Mobilise people with real evidence
ngos.body: Gather community signals, organise petitions, and measure impact with structured civic data, no be only story story.

articles.title: Continuous participation, no be election time alone

issues.title: Report and follow issue
issues.body: Pothole, broken streetlight, dangerous road — file am inside three minutes with picture and follow am from open to under review to resolved.

petitions.title: Start and sign petition
petitions.body: Petition wey get goal with auto milestone for 25%, 50%, and 100%. One citizen, one signature, no inflated numbers.

reps.title: Follow your representatives
reps.body: See who dey represent you, wetin dem don talk, and how fast dem dey reply — everytin for public profile wey dey update itself.

discover.title: Discover wetin dey happen near you
discover.body: Feed wey we rank by proximity: your community first, then your LGA, then your state — so local tin go dey on top.

notifications.title: Stay for loop in real time
notifications.body: Notification dey stream live the moment issue update, petition cross threshold, or your rep reply.

transparency.title: Transparency by default
transparency.body: Every interaction get timestamp and we fit trace am. Public information dey public; personal data dey private.

principles.title: Five principles, we write before the code
principles.note: Just as digital banking change how we dey move money, CivicOS dey change how we dey take part for democracy — transparent, accessible, and built to last.

steps.title: From sign-up to civic action under five minutes

join.title: Join the register
join.body: Sign up with your name and email. Identity verified, no paperwork, no fee.

pick.title: Choose your area
pick.body: Pick your state and LGA so we go know wetin be "near you" for your feed.

act.title: Take action
act.body: Report issue, sign petition, follow your reps — your name, your record.

follow.title: See wetin dem do
follow.body: Real-time updates as status dey change, response dey come, and milestones dey land.

cost.a: Yes. CivicOS free for citizens — forever. Reporting issues, signing petitions, following your reps, and receiving updates no go cost anything. Public institutions and NGOs fit get paid plan for advanced tools, but citizen experience dey free.

privacy.a: Your email, phone number, and address dey private, and we no go ever show am for public. Na only your display name, your role, and the public action wey you take (issues you raise, petitions you sign, comments you drop) other users go see. You dey control wetin you wan share.

reps.q: Reps dey really use the platform?
reps.a: We dey onboard reps community by community. Their reply rate dey for their public profile — accountability dey inside the design, so silence too na signal.

coverage.q: Wetin if nobody dey represent my area yet?
coverage.a: You fit still join, pick your community, and file. Once rep for your area join, your past activity go link with am automatically.

ownership.q: Who build CivicOS — and who own am?
ownership.a: CivicOS na open civic infrastructure, we build am for public and independent team dey run am. The codebase open, the architecture dey documented, and we dey welcome contributions. No political party, single funder, or business interest dey control the platform.

abuse.q: How una dey prevent abuse, spam, or fake news?
abuse.a: Every account na identity verified for sign-up. Comments and submissions get rate limit, we dey moderate dem against community guidelines, and dem dey traceable to real account. Petitions need unique signature — one citizen, one signature.

newsletter.title: Subscribe to The Dispatch — be the first to know when CivicOS reach your area
newsletter.sub: One short email every month with product updates, community milestones, and rollout news. No marketing wahala. Unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.doneSub: We go reach you as we dey expand coverage.

cta.title: Ready to take part?
cta.sub: Join citizens, reps, and organisations wey dey build accountable civic life — together, on the record.

footer.mission: Dey strengthen democratic participation through secure, transparent, accessible digital infrastructure.

login.title: Enter your civic command center.
login.description: Track community issues, sign petitions, and hold your reps accountable from one place.
login.cardSubtitle: Use your CivicOS details to continue.
login.error: We no fit sign you in. Check your email and password, then try again.

register.title: Build your citizen profile.
register.description: Join your local community space, report issues faster, and shape public decisions between elections.
register.cardSubtitle: E no go pass one minute to start.
register.error: We no fit create your account. Try different email or try again small time.

forgot.title: You forget your password?
forgot.description: Enter the email wey you take sign up. We go send link so you fit set new password.
forgot.cardSubtitle: The link go work for one hour.
forgot.sentSub: If account dey for {{email}}, reset link don dey on the way. Give am one minute — check spam too.
forgot.unknownEmailNote: For your security, we no dey confirm whether email don register.

reset.title: Set new password.
reset.description: Pick something wey you no dey use for another place. Minimum 8 characters.
reset.tooShort: Password suppose reach 8 characters at least.
reset.successSub: You don sign in. Time to face wetin dey important.
reset.expiredSub: Reset links last one hour. Request new one to continue.
reset.invalidTitle: This reset link no work again.
reset.invalidSub: Maybe somebody don use am. Request new one if you still need to reset.

verify.sentSub: We don send verification link go {{email}}. Click am to confirm your account — the link go work for 24 hours.
verify.sentTip: You no see am? Check spam, or use the button below to resend.
verify.resent: Don send. Give am one minute.
verify.goToLogin: I go verify later — sign in
verify.successSub: You don ready. You fit now report issues, sign petitions, and join the conversation.
verify.invalidTitle: This verification link no work again.
verify.expiredSub: Verification links last 24 hours. Sign in and request fresh one from your profile.
verify.invalidSub: Maybe somebody don use am. Sign in and request fresh one if your email never verify.
verify.bannerTitle: Verify your email to unlock everything.
verify.bannerSub: We send link go {{email}}. Until you click am, you fit browse but you no fit file, sign, or comment.
